How to get in touch

You can get in touch using the form opposite.

You can also contact me in the following ways:

Email
laurence.turner.mp@parliament.uk

Phone
0121 516 5770

Constituency office (note - meetings are by appointment only).
The Factory
5 Devon Way
Longbridge
B31 2TS

Please include your home address in written correspondence so that I can prioritise messages from constituents.

Please note also that surgeries are not held at the office - they are held at sites across the constituency on a rotating basis.

Promoted by and on behalf of Laurence Turner of Terry Duffy House, 1 Thomas Street, B70 6NT
